headline: Eaton Expands U.S. Production As AI Data Centers Drive Valuation Questions
summary: Eaton, NYSE:ETN, has announced a U.S. manufacturing expansion to support growing electrification needs from AI driven data centers. The company plans to invest more than $30 million in medium voltage switchgear production, including a new 370,000 square foot facility in Nebraska. The Nebraska plant is expected to start production in 2027 and create over 200 new jobs. Eaton is tying its growth plans directly to the build out of nearly 3,000 planned U.S. data centers, aiming to supply key...

headline: Assessing Eaton (ETN) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Performance
summary: What recent performance says about Eaton (ETN) for investors Eaton (ETN) has drawn attention after recent share gains, with the stock up about 4% over the past day, 11% over the past week, and similar moves over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Eaton. For context, Eaton’s recent momentum comes on top of a 22.3% year to date share price return and a 49.7% total shareholder return over the past year, supported by even stronger three and five year total shareholder...

headline: Fastenal Q1 Earnings Results Ahead: What Investors Need to Know
summary: FAST is set to report Q1 2026 results on April 13, with EPS seen up 15.4% and revenue at $2.2B as contract strength meets margin pressure.
